title: Wrong join result
description:
### What happens?

Hi, DuckDB Developers,

I perform the following cases, and meet some wrong join result.
```sql
CREATE TABLE t1(c0 INT);
CREATE TABLE t2(c0 INT);

INSERT INTO t2(c0) VALUES (NULL);
INSERT INTO t1(c0) VALUES (1);

SELECT * FROM t1 INNER JOIN t2 ON ((t2.c0)>=(t2.c0));
-- 1, NULL
-- Wrong result, should be empty, because NULL >= NULL is NULL;
```


### To Reproduce

```sql
CREATE TABLE t1(c0 INT);
CREATE TABLE t2(c0 INT);

INSERT INTO t2(c0) VALUES (NULL);
INSERT INTO t1(c0) VALUES (1);

SELECT * FROM t1 INNER JOIN t2 ON ((t2.c0)>=(t2.c0));
-- 1, NULL
-- Wrong result, should be empty, because NULL >= NULL is NULL;
```

### OS:

MacOS

v1.3.0-dev2944 60efcc9d7d
